name: Lentils and Rice (Mujadarra)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice 3 of the onions.
2. Heat a large heavy skillet and add 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Add the diced onions. Sauté until quite brown, then set aside.
3. In a large covered pot, combine the lentils and cold water. Bring to a boil, uncovered.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for about 15 minutes.
5. Add the cooked onion to the lentils, along with the rice and salt. Cover and simmer for an additional 20 minutes until rice and lentils are soft.
6. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes.
7. Slice the remaining 2 onions into rings.
8. Heat the skillet again and add the remaining oil. Sauté the onion rings.
9. To serve, top the lentils with the sautéed onion rings.
